text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Did you watch the Oka Sho? Hishi Amazon was
great.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I know, right?! She's a bit rough around the
edges, but she did a pretty good job.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I kinda get the feeling that Hishi Amazon is to the
Tiara what Narita Brian is to the Triple Crown,
y'know what I mean?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like we're gaining new fans among the
spectators. Meanwhile, Hishi Amazon is getting
ready.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The air is thick with tension! I guess everyone's
lookin' to get their hands on that tiara!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Brian's already won a crown and she's a record holder now. I can't be off my game.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna crush the Japanese Oaks with
everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon's powerful declaration echoes
through the runners' tunnel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The tussle for the second tiara begins now!
